character_buff.name: Rage
character_buff.description: Transform the repressed energy to ATK in rage status.

effects: [Rage] Change to [Blood Revenge] by canceling for 60 seconds

stances.name: Bare Knuckle
lv25_bonus_extra: None

skills.name: Crescent Moon
skills.description: Swings a sword in a moon-shaped arc to bring enemies down.

skills.name: Grind Cutter
skills.description: Swings a sabre in a powerful whirling motion.

skills.name: Assassinate
skills.description: Confuses enemies with swift pierces before dealing a critical attack.
skills.target: Up to 5 enemies 4m away and within 3m width

skills.name: Triskelion
skills.description: Consecutive triple combo wind pressure attack.

skills.name: Sabre Charge
skills.description: A forceful charge that sweeps enemies away.
skills.target: Up to 5 enemies 6m away and within 3m width

skills.name: Suspense violation
skills.description: A slashing attack to multiple enemies.

skills.name: Tearing alternate
skills.description: Enemies feel as if their bodies are being torn apart by dimensional forces.

skills.name: Deep Straight
skills.description: Impales the enemy on a sword before delivering a powerful kick.

skills.name: Earth Tremor
skills.description: Plunges sword into enemy while airborne.

skills.name: Penta-Train
skills.description: A series of aggressive attacks that pushes the enemy back.

skills.name: Vortex Slash
skills.description: Make a series of fast and powerful attacks.

skills.name: Hexen Dropper
skills.description: Slashes mercilessly with a set of double swords.

skills.name: Dust Devil
skills.description: Kicks up a vicious dust storm that envelops enemies in the vicinity.
skills.target: Up to 5 Enemies within a range of 2.5m

skills.name: Cross Penetration
skills.description: Takes enemies down with powerful thrusts from a set of twin swords.

stances.name: Bloody Feast

skills.name: Crimson Crescent
skills.description: Jump briefly and fire two red beams towards a distant enemy. From Skill Lv.11 onwards, [Bloody Fiesta]s Lv. increases on use.

skills.name: Bloody Horizon
skills.description: Cross two sabres rapidly and make four consecutive attacks towards thesurrounding enemies. [Bloody Fiesta]s Lv. increases on use.

skills.name: Destination
skills.description: More blood makes you stronger. If Bloody Fiesta is active, buff level +1.

skills.name: Vortex Slicer
skills.description: Uses two sabers to attack the enemy with dazzling, dance-like moves. [Bloody Fiesta]s Lv. increases on use.

skills.name: Phantastorm
skills.description: Runs along a reverse pentagram and destroys enemies along the way. Increases damage by 10% per level of Bloody Fiesta, then Bloody Fiesta ends.

lv25_bonus_extra: [RE: PvE] Skill DMG increases equal to 8% of extra [AGI]
[PVP/PVE Maps] Additional 4% DMG according to extra [AGI]
Ignore additional DEF according to extra [AGI] * 4
Additional DMG against [PC] + 2x
Additional DMG against Monster according to 4 * 50

skills.name: Pistol Shot
skills.description: Shoots 5 times consecutively with the pistol in the left hand. This can be used as a normal attack.

skills.name: Slash Down
skills.description: Delivers downward slashes.

skills.name: Deadly Infinitum
skills.description: Slashes enemies mercilessly before finishing him off with a shot.

skills.name: Grind Cutter
skills.description: Swings a sabre in a powerful whirling motion.

skills.name: Into The Hell
skills.description: Fires a series of pistol shots at an enemy and advance upon him with a blade.

stances.name: Corsair

skills.name: Inferno of Revolver
skills.description: After the left hand fires the pistol, it causes a sword storm to check the enemy.

skills.name: Pirate Code
skills.description: Launches the signal to announce the battle on board to boost the morale.

skills.name: Devil Brake
skills.description: After cutting the designated target successively, it ends with pistol shooting.

skills.name: Sea of Devil
skills.description: After attacking the enemy with Saber indiscriminately, it ends with pistol shooting.

skills.name: Into the Inferno
skills.description: After shooting every enemy in the straight line simultaneously, breaks them.
skills.target: Up to 6 enemies 11m away and within 6m width

skills.name: Plumbullet shot
skills.description: Fires a poisonous bullet.

skills.name: Double Firing
skills.description: Fire two rapid shots consecutively.

skills.name: Snap Shot
skills.description: Shoots 5 targets within a certain area.
skills.target: Up to 5 enemies 9m away and within a 3m radius

skills.name: Zero-In
skills.description: Fires rapidly at a single enemy.

skills.name: Westraid
skills.description: Increases your shooting speed but sacrifices accuracy. A change of stance will cause you to lose this effect.

skills.name: Triple Firing
skills.description: A rapid attack of 3 shots.

skills.name: Quick and Dead
skills.description: Fires randomly at a group of enemies.
skills.target: Up to 5 enemies 9m away and within a 3m radius

skills.name: Ankle Shot
skills.description: Shot to ankle of enemy.

skills.name: Barrage Shots
skills.description: Fires wildly at an area in front of you.
skills.target: Up to 6 enemies 7m away and within a 4m radius.

skills.name: Clincher
skills.description: Fires a critical shot at an enemy.

skills.name: Surpassing Shot
skills.description: Grievous damage on a single enemy.

stances.name: Wanted

skills.name: Sting Bringer
skills.description: Quickly targets your enemy to deliver a shot.

skills.name: Wanted Action
skills.description: Release all of ability of your body to obtain a [Free] status. It is cancelled when the stance is changed.

skills.name: Slider Shot
skills.description: Slide to the front to control your enemies.
skills.target: Up to 6 enemies 10m away and within a 5m radius

skills.name: Escape Shot
skills.description: Fling your body backwards to control the attack of an enemy while simultaneously firing a shot.

skills.name: Life Sentence
skills.description: Fires a strong shot that can control enemies around you by gathering your body power.
skills.target: Up to 6 enemies 12m away and within an 8m radius

skills.name: Westraid
skills.description: Increases your shooting speed but sacrifices accuracy. A change of stance will cause you to lose this effect.

skills.name: Bloody Overdrive
skills.description: Fires mercilessly in all directions at surrounding enemies.
skills.target: Up to 8 enemies within a range of 7.5m

skills.name: Quattro Firing
skills.description: Fires 4 rapid shots at a single enemy.

skills.name: R.I.P.
skills.description: Fires a series of rapid shots at an enemy with dual pistols.

skills.name: Sapping Shots
skills.description: Fires at enemy (Unable to move the lower half of own body).

skills.name: Octet-stream
skills.description: Fires 8 times consecutively.

skills.name: Dancing Revolvers
skills.description: A frenzy of graceful shots at enemies.
skills.target: Up to 6 enemies 8m away and within a 4m radius.

skills.name: Desperados
skills.description: Random shots at enemies.

stances.name: Unlimited Shot

skills.name: Circle Shot
skills.description: Quickly targets the enemy in a circle to fire an accurate shot.

skills.name: Reload Action
skills.description: Reload to clear all your cooldowns and obtain an [Equilibrium] status. It is cancelled when the stance is changed.

skills.name: Circle Penetration
skills.description: Fire a series of rapid shots in succession to all enemies within a range.

skills.name: Back Slider
skills.description: While evading and firing simultaneously, quickly jump backwards.
skills.target: Up to 5 enemies 9m away and within a 3m radius

skills.name: Death Sentence
skills.description: Jump to shoot a weak point located above head before finishing with a landing.
